title: angelopogon linearifolium
intro: Angelopogon linearifolium is a species of flowering plant in the family Poaceae, commonly known as a type of grass. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Angelopogon linearifolium include its ability to reduce fever, treat respiratory issues, and alleviate digestive problems. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea by infusing the leaves and stems in hot water, or by making a decoction by boiling the roots and stems in water.
